results.details: 'on-fail' tokenized as single KEYWORD; 'escalates-to' tokenized as single KEYWORD; 'system-architect' tokenized as IDENTIFIER; Arrow '->' not consumed by hyphen logic

results.name: Lexer -- Structural tokens: arrows, brackets, commas, newlines
results.details: LIST_START and LIST_END present; Two COMMA tokens found (3-element list); All tokens have line and column metadata

results.name: Complex -- Full Lexer->Parser->Transpiler on multi-construct .syn
results.details: Lexer produced 247 tokens; Comments stripped from token stream; Parser produced 5 top-level nodes (3 agents, 1 workflow, 1 pipeline); Correct distribution: 3 agents, 1 workflow, 1 pipeline; Transpiler.toJSON produced 5 JSON objects; system-architect JSON fields correct; Workflow JSON with 3 steps and on-fail=retry correct; Pipeline JSON with 3 stages (1 parallel, 2 then) correct; Agent markdown: frontmatter, title, prompt, handlers all present; 3 registration messages (agents only)
